# XMEL Automations

> AI automation agency building autonomous voice AI agents, n8n workflow automations, and intelligent lead response systems for businesses across real estate, home services, e-commerce, and healthcare.

XMEL Automations designs, builds, and deploys AI-powered systems that eliminate manual bottlenecks in lead response, customer communication, and operational workflows. We use GPT-4o-mini, Twilio, Vapi, ElevenLabs, and n8n to create autonomous systems that respond instantly, 24/7.

Founded by Yashwardhan Chauhan, based in India, working with clients globally.

## Services

- [AI Lead Response Automation](https://xmelautomations.dpdns.org/#isa-system): Autonomous systems that qualify, respond to, and book appointments with inbound leads across voice, SMS, WhatsApp, and web forms.
- [Voice AI Agent Development](https://xmelautomations.dpdns.org/#isa-system): Custom AI phone agents built on Vapi, Twilio, and ElevenLabs that answer calls, qualify prospects, and book appointments 24/7.
- [n8n Workflow Automation](https://xmelautomations.dpdns.org/#isa-system): Complex multi-step automations connecting CRM, lead qualification, appointment booking, notifications, and data sync.
- [WhatsApp Automation Bot](https://xmelautomations.dpdns.org/#isa-system): AI-powered WhatsApp chatbots that qualify leads, answer questions, and sync data to CRM in real time.

## Blog

- [How AI Lead Response Automation Works for Real Estate Agents](https://xmelautomations.dpdns.org/blog/ai-lead-response-real-estate): Complete breakdown of AI lead qualification, response systems, and appointment booking for real estate.
- [n8n Workflow Automation: Building a 67-Node Lead Qualification System](https://xmelautomations.dpdns.org/blog/n8n-workflow-automation-guide): Technical deep-dive into n8n workflow architecture for lead qualification and multi-channel outreach.
- [Voice AI Agent vs Human Inside Sales Agent: Cost and Speed Comparison](https://xmelautomations.dpdns.org/blog/voice-ai-agent-vs-human-isa): Data-driven comparison of AI voice agents and human ISAs covering speed, accuracy, cost, and availability.

## Company

- [About Yashwardhan Chauhan](https://xmelautomations.dpdns.org/#about): AI automation engineer and founder of XMEL Automations.
- [Contact](https://xmelautomations.dpdns.org/#contact): Get in touch for AI automation projects.
- [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/yashwardhan-chauhan-075684414/): Professional profile and updates.
- [Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/yashwardhan.ai/): Behind-the-scenes and project updates.

## Key Facts

- Specializes in AI automation for real estate, home services, e-commerce, and healthcare
- Core stack: n8n, GPT-4o-mini, Twilio, Vapi, ElevenLabs, Google Workspace
- Systems respond to leads in under 50 seconds, 24/7
- 67-node n8n workflows with 7 webhook triggers
- 94% lead qualification accuracy
- Based in India, working globally
